title: lippia martiana
intro: Lippia martiana, also known as Lippia or Mexican oregano, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family (Verbenaceae) native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lippia martiana include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Lippia martiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion and relieve stress.
